calendar.matters:
Notice Of Moiton And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: appearances:
pamela a. underwood, assistant district attorney, office of the district attorney, tel. 415.551.9544, for petitioner/moving party people of the state of california.

no appearance by respondent property subject to disposition: $853.00 u.s. currency.

The respondent is deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. see written order.

judge pro tem nils rosenquest, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories; Pos
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., Assistant District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9544, appearing for the Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance and the tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is Granted on the grounds set forth in the moving papers: (1) the Motion is not opposed. (2) Claimant Matthew Meason has not submitted any response or proposed response to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents, Petitioner's First Set of Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, or Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa, not reported.
